title: Ground Touchdowns
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN OnPlanet = 1 AND OnStation = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onPlanet FROM Touchdown WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND PlayerControlled = 1

details.help: PlayerControlled Touchdown events — SRV deployments and ship surface landings
